public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as liaison.
manner: Sounds hospitable until terms blur, then becomes sharply attentive to cost and precedent. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a liaison still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of liaison in and around Engineers’ Consortium, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Engineers’ Consortium workable through the obligations of liaison while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Engineers’ Consortium, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of liaison visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ysmir Rimeclasp needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Engineers’ Consortium before trust collapses.
Ysmir Rimeclasp can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Ysmir Rimeclasp read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Engineers’ Consortium: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
